name: parallel-tool-executor-concurrency
description: Parallel tool executors: how to safely batch concurrent tool calls while preserving deterministic context mutation. TRIGGER when: designing a tool executor that runs multiple tool calls concurrently, when debugging non-deterministic context state after concurrent tool execution, when deciding whether a tool call is safe to run concurrently, or when a write tool appears in a batch with read tools. Load when writing any code that executes multiple tool calls in parallel.
author: Anthropic
